description: Complete the full enterprise pipeline: close deal DEAL-001, resolve ticket TKT-100, file a compliance report with a generated compliance_id, and submit an audit-ready summary. WARNING: Multiple sources are unreliable. API schemas will change mid-task. Policy thresholds will shift. Trust nothing without independent verification.

close_deal.description: Close DEAL-001 with compliance_id via v2 API

resolve_ticket.description: Resolve TKT-100 with correct root cause and resolution

submit_compliance_report.description: Submit compliance report with correct compliance_id and deal data

submit_audit_summary.description: Submit audit summary referencing all completed actions with verified data

drift_events.error_message: Endpoint deprecated. The Deals API has been migrated to v2 as of April 19, 2026.
Missing required field 'compliance_id'. Generate one via POST /v2/compliance/generate with deal_id.

drift_events.new_text: UPDATED POLICY (effective April 20, 2026): Deals valued over $25,000 now require VP approval AND compliance review before closing. Agents may offer discounts up to 5%. All discounts over 5% require both manager and compliance sign-off.
